alibaba/happyhorse-1.0.description: Alibaba's Happy Horse 1.0 generates videos from text prompts or animates a single image into video. Supports 720p and 1080p, 3-15 second durations, and five aspect ratios.

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible generation. Range: 0-2147483647

image.description: First-frame image to animate. When provided, the model runs in image-to-video mode. Accepts jpg/png/bmp/webp, ≤10MB, aspect ratio between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1, each side ≥300px.

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation. Optional when an image is provided.

duration.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video. Only applies to text-to-video — when an image is provided, the image's aspect ratio is used.

kwaivgi/kling-v3-omni-video.description: Kling Video 3.0 Omni: Unified multimodal video generation with reference images, video editing, native audio, and multi-shot control

mode.description: 'standard' generates 720p, 'pro' generates 1080p, '4k' generates 4K. 4K does not support reference_video.

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation. Supports <<<image_1>>>, <<<video_1>>> template references. Max 2500 characters.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds (3-15). Ignored for video editing (base).

end_image.description: Last frame image. Requires start_image. Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png, max 10MB, min 300px.

start_image.description: First frame image. Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png, max 10MB, min 300px, aspect ratio 1:2.5 to 2.5:1.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio. Required when not using start frame or video editing.

multi_prompt.description: JSON array of shot definitions for multi-shot mode. Each shot: {"prompt": "...", "duration": N}. Max 6 shots, min duration 1s per shot, total must equal duration. Example: [{"prompt":"A cat jumps","duration":3},{"prompt":"It lands","duration":2}]

generate_audio.description: Generate native audio. Mutually exclusive with reference video.

reference_video.description: Reference video (.mp4/.mov). Duration 3-10s, resolution 720-2160px per side, max 200MB.

reference_images.description: Reference images for elements, scenes, or styles. Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png. Max 7 without video, 4 with video.

keep_original_sound.description: Keep original sound from reference video.

video_reference_type.description: How to use reference video: 'feature' for style/camera reference, 'base' for video editing.

bytedance/seedance-2.0-fast.description: A faster variant of Seedance 2.0 for quicker video generation with multimodal inputs and native audio.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.

image.description: Input image for image-to-video generation (first frame). Cannot be combined with reference images.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. Set to -1 for intelligent duration (model picks the best length).

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. Set to 'adaptive' to let the model choose the best ratio based on inputs.

generate_audio.description: Generate synchronized audio with the video, including dialogue (use double quotes in prompt), sound effects, and background music.

last_frame_image.description: Input image for last frame generation. Only works if a first frame image is also provided. Cannot be combined with reference images.

reference_audios.description: Reference audio files (up to 3, total duration max 15s) for audio-driven generation and lip-sync. Requires at least one reference image or video. Reference them in your prompt as [Audio1], [Audio2], etc.

reference_images.description: Reference images (up to 9) for character consistency, style guidance, and scene composition. Cannot be used together with first/last frame images. You can reference them in your prompt as [Image1], [Image2], etc.

reference_videos.description: Reference videos (up to 3, total duration max 15s) for motion transfer, style reference, and editing. Reference them in your prompt as [Video1], [Video2], etc.

runwayml/gen-4.5.description: State-of-the-art video motion quality, prompt adherence and visual fidelity

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation

image.description: Optional initial image for video generation (first frame). If not provided, video will be generated from text only.

duration.description: Duration of the output video in seconds

bytedance/dreamactor-m2.0.description: Animate any character, humans, cartoons, animals, even non-humans, from a single image + driving video

image.description: Input image containing a human subject. Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG. Max size: 4.7 MB. Resolution: 480x480 to 1920x1080.

video.description: Template video whose motion, facial expressions, and lip movements will be applied to the image subject. Supported formats: MP4, MOV, WebM. Max duration: 30 seconds. Resolution: 200x200 to 2048x1440.

cut_first_second.description: Whether to crop the first second of the output video (removes the 1-second transition at the beginning).

runwayml/aleph-2.description: Edit one frame to update an entire video. Aleph 2.0 is Runway's in-context video editor: longer clips (up to 30s), multi-shot edits, and image-level precision via keyframe references.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation

video.description: Input video to edit. Videos must be between 2 and 30 seconds and less than 16MB.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the edit to be applied to the input video.

keyframe_images.description: Up to 5 optional keyframe images used as more precise control over edits. The position of each keyframe is given by keyframe_positions.

keyframe_positions.description: Position of each keyframe in keyframe_images. One entry per image. Each value must be 'first', 'last', or a timestamp in seconds (e.g. '1.67').

kwaivgi/kling-v3-motion-control.description: Kling 3.0 motion control: transfer motion from a reference video to any character image with improved consistency and quality.

mode.description: Video generation mode. 'std': Standard mode (720p, cost-effective). 'pro': Professional mode (1080p, higher quality).

image.description: Reference image. The characters, backgrounds, and other elements in the generated video are based on the reference image. Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png, max 10MB, dimensions 340px-3850px, aspect ratio 1:2.5 to 2.5:1.

video.description: Reference video. The character actions in the generated video are consistent with the reference video. Supports .mp4/.mov, max 100MB, 3-30 seconds duration depending on character_orientation.

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation. You can add elements to the screen and achieve motion effects through prompt words.

keep_original_sound.description: Whether to keep the original sound of the reference video

character_orientation.description: Orientation of the character in the generated video. 'image': same orientation as the person in the picture (max 10s video). 'video': consistent with the orientation of the characters in the video (max 30s video). When binding elements, only 'video' orientation is supported.

kwaivgi/kling-o1.description: Modify an existing video through natural-language commands, changing subjects, environments, and visual style while preserving the original motion and timing.

mode.description: Video generation mode. 'std' is cost-effective, 'pro' has higher quality.

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation. Can include references like <<<image_1>>>, <<<video_1>>> to reference inputs.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. For text/image-to-video: 5 or 10. With video reference (feature type): 3-10. Ignored for video editing (base type).

end_image.description: Last frame image for the video. Requires start_image to be set. Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png, max 10MB.

start_image.description: First frame image for the video. Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png, max 10MB.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video. Required for text-to-video. Ignored when using first frame image or video editing.

reference_video.description: Reference video for style, camera movement, or as base for editing. Supports .mp4/.mov, 3-10s duration, max 200MB.

reference_images.description: Reference images for elements, scenes, or styles (up to 7 without video, 4 with video). Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png.

keep_original_sound.description: Whether to keep the original sound from the reference video.

video_reference_type.description: How to use the reference video: 'feature' for style/camera reference, 'base' for video editing.
